definition:
ἴδε (Attic ἰδέ; the "later" accentuation is also found in Hom.; Veitch, 215) 
   1. prop., 2 aor. imperat. of ὁράω, which see 
   2. As interjection, apart from the construction of the sentence, and used where one or many are addressed, see! behold! lo!: Mat.25:20, 22 25:25, Mrk.2:24 3:34 11:21 13:1, 21 15:4, 35 16:6, Jhn.1:29, 36 1:48 3:26 5:14 7:26 11:3, 36 12:19 16:29 18:21 19:4, 14 19:26-27, Gal.5:2.†
 (AS)
